meta.description: A single log line — timestamp, level, message and optional structured data
meta.keywords: log entry line message debug info warn error

data.description: Structured log data (parked as string until shape is defined).

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_4031fd9f_5a03_44f0_b960_98acf1c4327a" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "ts" TEXT,
    "level" TEXT,
    "message" TEXT,
    "data" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_4031fd9f_5a03_44f0_b960_98acf1c4327a" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_4031fd9f5a0344f0_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
